name: Sam Altman
bio: Sam Altman is co-founder and CEO of OpenAI, the AI lab behind ChatGPT, GPT-5, and the GPT-Realtime family. He is widely regarded as one of the most influential figures shaping the commercial AI industry, frequently using X to set product direction and respond to competitors in real time.

quotes.text: Codex is free for two months for new business customers — we're confident that once teams see what it can do, they'll stay.
quotes.topic: Counter-offer to Anthropic's separate agent-SDK credit meter after Ramp Index shows Anthropic overtaking OpenAI in US business adoption
